Application Load Balancer
HTTP :80 &→ Target Group :8000
Health: GET /health (30s interval)

span.p:
Amazon DynamoDB
Table: campus-print-jobs
PK: jobId | GSI: userId-createdAt
PAY_PER_REQUEST | TTL enabled

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Amazon S3
Bucket: campus-print-docs-*
Key: uploads/jobId/fileName
Lifecycle: 1-day expiry
